meta.purpose: Unified source registry for Time Machine (v3+). Every source — annal (event-scoped, shown as account tabs) or tarajim (person-scoped, shown as biography links in the figures block) — is registered once here by id. The renderer reads names/books from this registry; adding a new source means adding one entry here. Supersedes chronicles.json (kept as a back-compat fallback). See DATA-MODEL.md.
